news.t: QEW ETF: Steady Start for Invesco’s New Equal-Weight Nasdaq-100 Fund in 2026
Invesco Expands the Invesco QQQ Innovation Suite with the Launch of Invesco QQQ Equal Weight ETF (QEW)

holdings.infoBox: QEW is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 2.83%, Arm Holdings at 2.51%, Intel at 2.34%, Advanced Micro Devices at 2.19%, and Micron Technology at 2.07%.

overview.description: The Invesco QQQ Equal Weight ETF (QEW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ-100 Equally Weighted index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted version of the NASDAQ 100.   QEW was launched on Mar 18, 2026 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: QEW ETF: Steady Start for Invesco’s New Equal-Weight Nasdaq-100 Fund in 2026
data.text: The Invesco QQQ Equal Weight ETF ($QEW) is one of the newest additions to Invesco’s offerings, launched on March 18, 2026. It is an equal-weighted alternative to the traditional Nasdaq‑100…
